国运怪谈降临蓝星，唐刚成为了龙国的第三位降临者。
而当其他人都在怪谈世界苦苦求生的时候，他已经开始了在怪谈世界中的“大哥成长史”。
一家鬼：“第一天晚上，他说既然难办，那就别办了，然后直接把饭桌给掀了！”
商店鬼老板：“他第一次来还是正常的买东西，第二次来他说来找工作，然后我就被迫交了保护费！”
鬼邻居：“我就和他打个招呼，他直接把我从楼上扔下去了！”
鬼校长：“上课时我来视察，结果他说我打扰他教学用板砖照我脸上一顿糊！”
鬼学生：“我曾亲眼看着他和我们体育老师打篮球……我就是那个球呜呜呜呜！”
大哥鬼：“他说给我变个魔术，然后我就看见他用铅笔杀了我三个小弟！就仅仅是一支铅笔！太吓鬼了！”
唐刚：“那年十八，害怕诡异不够暴力。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/303a09e0a15d42e8decae64b533aaa07","author":"甘茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7217008342269430819","book_name":"肌肉面前，众生平等，诡异也一样","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6362人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7217010583529325067","read_count":"6362","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"746322"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"323","tags":"悬疑脑洞,直播,灵异,无敌,无女主,国运,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4b315b391ad45481bdbac893b85de96a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449276&x-signature=z6nHQEIIpNqfpIzdYoaFaiWBlIg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101973462261","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.901487e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192755AEAAEB9F1701641BA13C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"rep
